B C G I L O P S V 

S

setBluetoothDeviceStatusTimings(int, int) - Method in class com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.BluetoothService
This method changes the number of retries and the delay between retries (in seconds) when user's phone/tablet checks device joining status via Bluetooth LE.
setProgressView(CirrentProgressView) - Method in class com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.BluetoothService
This method allows to set a custom progress view that will be shown during requests execution.
setProgressView(CirrentProgressView) - Method in class com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.SoftApService
This method allows to set a custom progress view that will be shown during requests execution.
setSoftApConnectTimings(int, int) - Method in class com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.SoftApService
This method changes the number of retries and the delay between retries (in seconds) when user's phone/tablet tries to connect to device via Soft AP.
setSoftApDeviceStatusTimings(int, int) - Method in class com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.SoftApService
This method changes the number of retries and the delay between retries (in seconds) when user's phone/tablet checks device joining status via Soft AP.
setSoftApDisconnectTimings(int, int) - Method in class com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.SoftApService
This method changes the number of retries and the delay between retries (in seconds) when user's phone/tablet tries to disconnect from Soft AP device network.
setSoftApPort(int) - Method in class com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.SoftApService
This method changes default SoftAP port.
SoftApService - Class in com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service
 
SoftApService() - Constructor for class com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service.SoftApService
 
SoftApService.InternetConnectionCallback - Interface in com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service
 
SoftApService.SoftApCredentialsSenderCallback - Interface in com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service
 
SoftApService.SoftApDeviceConnectionCallback - Interface in com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service
 
SoftApService.SoftApDeviceConnectionError - Enum in com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service
 
SoftApService.SoftApDeviceInfoCallback - Interface in com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service
 
SoftApService.SoftApIdentificationCallback - Interface in com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service
 
SoftApService.SoftApJoiningStatusCallback - Interface in com.cirrent.cirrentsdk.service
